Data Science.title: Building AI Agents in Python with Pydantic AI
Effective KV Compression with TurboQuant
Data Science.summary: TurboQuant has recently been launched by Google as a novel algorithmic suite and library for applying advanced quantization and compression to large language models (LLMs) and vector search engines — an indispensable element of RAG systems.
